n: Chapter 3: Inside the Chamber of Mazarbul

steps.t: Wárr is in the Chamber of Mazarbul, located to the right off the north hallway that leaves the Twenty-first Hall, in Zelem-melek. Brogur has told you …

Brogur is in the Chamber of Leadership off the Twenty-first Hall in Zelem-melek. You found a mysterious book in the rubble of the Chamber of Mazarbul …
